query: INSERT INTO citations (id, message_id, doc_id, quote_text, page_number, clause_section_ref, additional_metadata) SELECT id, $2, doc_id, quote_text, page_number, clause_section_ref, meta::jsonb FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $3::uuid[], $4::text[], $5::int4[], $6::text[], $7::text[]) AS t(id, doc_id, quote_text, page_number, clause_section_ref, meta)
